name: New Potato Salad with Buttermilk Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 medium sweet pepper (yellow, orange, or red)
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub and halve the potatoes lengthwise.
2. Bring a large pot of salted water to boil.
3. Add potatoes, cover, and return to boil.
4. Cook for 15 minutes or until fork tender.
5. Whisk together dressing ingredients in a large bowl.
6. Drain potatoes; let cool for 5 to 10 minutes or until no longer steaming.
7. Cut potatoes into bite-sized pieces.
8. Gently stir the potato pieces into the dressing, along with radishes, onions, and chopped sweet pepper.
9. Makes 4 servings.
